reason: Merged PR #63 establishes the first accepted physical implementation result for the bounded int8 sigmoid pwl wrapper on Nangate45, with multiple ok rows and a selected best point sufficient to unblock Layer 2 nonlinear activation-family measurement work.
next_action: unblock prop_l2_mapper_terminal_activation_family_v1 and queue its measurement_only nm1 reference item against the accepted Layer 1 sigmoid block
